name: Crunchy Cinnamon S'mores
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first five ingredients in a 3-quart casserole dish.
2. Cover tightly and microwave on high until boiling, about 2 to 3 minutes or longer depending on the wattage of your microwave. Stir occasionally.
3. Fold in the cereal until completely coated with chocolate.
4. Add in the marshmallows and fold gently.
5. Press the mixture evenly into a greased baking pan, 9 x 9 inches.
6. Let stand at room temperature for about 1 hour.
7. Cut into about 2-inch squares.
== Courtesy of Dale & Gail Shipp, Columbia Md. ==
